description: Execute a post-demo sales workflow for the 'GlobalTech - Enterprise Software License' opportunity. Update the opportunity stage to 'Proposal/Price Quote' and probability to 65%. Log a completed meeting event related to this opportunity with the subject 'Product Demo and Q&A', activity type 'Meeting', and status 'Held' for a past date. Schedule a high-priority follow-up task related to this opportunity with the subject 'Draft and Send Enterprise Proposal' and status 'Not Started' for a future date. Ensure all records are saved and properly linked.
